# Mateo Krössler
> Personal website for Mateo Krössler, Product and Data lead focused on AI products, analytics, and UX.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://mateokrossler.com/): Main profile and intro.
- [Work](https://mateokrossler.com/work): Product achievements and recent outcomes.
- [Skills](https://mateokrossler.com/skills): Detailed skill set across product, data, AI, development, and UX.
- [Photography](https://mateokrossler.com/photography): Photography background and published work.

## External Profiles
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mateokrossler/)
- [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/@mateokross)

## Structured Discovery
- [Sitemap](https://mateokrossler.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://mateokrossler.com/robots.txt)

## Notes
- Canonical language for indexing is English.
- Spanish content is available via the in-page language toggle.
